1: # frozen_string_literal: true
2: 
3: class BatchedRemoveStatusService < BaseService
4:   include Redisable
5: 
6:   # Delete multiple statuses and reblogs of them as efficiently as possible
7:   # @param [Enumerable<Status>] statuses An array of statuses
8:   # @param [Hash] options
9:   # @option [Boolean] :skip_side_effects Do not modify feeds and send updates to streaming API
10:   def call(statuses, **options)
11:     ActiveRecord::Associations::Preloader.new(
12:       records: statuses,
13:       associations: options[:skip_side_effects] ? :reblogs : [:account, :tags, reblogs: :account]
14:     ).call
15: 
16:     statuses_and_reblogs = statuses.flat_map { |status| [status] + status.reblogs }
17: 
18:     # The conversations for direct visibility statuses also need
19:     # to be manually updated. This part is not efficient but we
20:     # rely on direct visibility statuses being relatively rare.
21:     statuses_with_account_conversations = statuses.select(&:direct_visibility?)
22: 
23:     ActiveRecord::Associations::Preloader.new(
24:       records: statuses_with_account_conversations,
25:       associations: [mentions: :account]
26:     ).call
27: 
28:     statuses_with_account_conversations.each(&:unlink_from_conversations!)
29: 
30:     # We do not batch all deletes into one to avoid having a long-running
31:     # transaction lock the database, but we use the delete method instead
32:     # of destroy to avoid all callbacks. We rely on foreign keys to
33:     # cascade the delete faster without loading the associations.
34:     statuses_and_reblogs.each_slice(50) { |slice| Status.unscoped.where(id: slice.pluck(:id)).delete_all }
35: 
36:     # Since we skipped all callbacks, we also need to manually
37:     # deindex the statuses
38:     if Chewy.enabled?
39:       Chewy.strategy.current.update(StatusesIndex, statuses_and_reblogs)
40:       Chewy.strategy.current.update(PublicStatusesIndex, statuses_and_reblogs)
41:     end
42: 
43:     return if options[:skip_side_effects]
44: 
45:     # Batch by source account
46:     statuses_and_reblogs.group_by(&:account_id).each_value do |account_statuses|
47:       account = account_statuses.first.account
48: 
49:       next unless account
50: 
51:       unpush_from_home_timelines(account, account_statuses)
52:       unpush_from_list_timelines(account, account_statuses)
53:     end
54: 
55:     # Cannot be batched
56:     @status_id_cutoff = Mastodon::Snowflake.id_at(2.weeks.ago)
57:     redis.pipelined do |pipeline|
58:       statuses.each do |status|
59:         unpush_from_public_timelines(status, pipeline)
60:       end
61:     end
62:   end
63: 
64:   private
65: 
66:   def unpush_from_home_timelines(account, statuses)
67:     account.followers_for_local_distribution.includes(:user).reorder(nil).find_each do |follower|
68:       statuses.each do |status|
69:         FeedManager.instance.unpush_from_home(follower, status)
70:       end
71:     end
72:   end
73: 
74:   def unpush_from_list_timelines(account, statuses)
75:     account.lists_for_local_distribution.select(:id, :account_id).includes(account: :user).reorder(nil).find_each do |list|
76:       statuses.each do |status|
77:         FeedManager.instance.unpush_from_list(list, status)
78:       end
79:     end
80:   end
81: 
82:   def unpush_from_public_timelines(status, pipeline)
83:     return unless status.public_visibility? && status.id > @status_id_cutoff
84: 
85:     payload = { event: :delete, payload: status.id.to_s }.to_json
86: 
87:     pipeline.publish('timeline:public', payload)
88:     pipeline.publish(status.local? ? 'timeline:public:local' : 'timeline:public:remote', payload)
89: 
90:     if status.media_attachments.any?
91:       pipeline.publish('timeline:public:media', payload)
92:       pipeline.publish(status.local? ? 'timeline:public:local:media' : 'timeline:public:remote:media', payload)
93:     end
94: 
95:     status.tags.map { |tag| tag.name.downcase }.each do |hashtag|
96:       pipeline.publish("timeline:hashtag:#{hashtag}", payload)
97:       pipeline.publish("timeline:hashtag:#{hashtag}:local", payload) if status.local?
98:     end
99:   end
100: end
